narratives.evidence_quote: पश्चिमी देशों को इससे बड़ा झटका लगा।
narratives.reasoning: The text criticizes Western countries for their overconfidence and failure to garner global support for pressuring Russia, highlighting a diplomatic setback and portraying Western assumptions as flawed.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
narratives.reasoning: The text explicitly highlights the adverse outcome for European countries due to their energy dependence on Russia, framing the sanctions as backfiring and causing an energy crisis, which aligns with predicting negative consequences for the West.

narratives.evidence_quote: रूसी सेना दो साल में भी यूक्रेन को 'निपटा' पाने में विफल रही।
narratives.reasoning: This statement makes a prediction/assessment about the military outcome, noting Russia's failure to achieve its objective against Ukraine, which fits the definition of speculating on war results.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West is weak
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इस बीच अमेरिका भी अपने हाथ खड़े करते नजर आया लेकिन यूक्रेन अब भी मदद की उम्मीद लगाए हुआ है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly presents the United States, a key Western power, as standing by with its 'hands up' (helpless or inactive), implying weakness and an inability to decisively influence the situation despite Ukraine's hopes for aid.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Diplomacy does/will not work
subnarratives.evidence_quote: युद्ध तीसरे साल में प्रवेश कर गया है लेकिन युद्धविराम की कोई संभावना नजर नहीं आती.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement explicitly dismisses the potential for a ceasefire or diplomatic resolution to the conflict, supporting the subnarrative that diplomatic efforts are futile.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote supports the parent narrative by discrediting Western actions (sanctions) as ineffective and failing to achieve their stated goal of stopping Putin, which is a distinct argument not fully captured by the other specific subnarratives.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Sanctions imposed by Western countries will backfire
subnarratives.evidence_quote: हालांकि, फिर भी वे व्लादिमीर पुतिन को रोक पाने में विफल रहे और आज यह बात जहजाहिर है कि पश्चिमी और यूरोपीय प्रतिबंधों का रूस पर ज्यादा कुछ असर नहीं हुआ।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Western and European sanctions have failed to stop Putin and have had little effect on Russia, which aligns with the definition of catastrophizing the ineffectiveness and backfiring of Western sanctions.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस यूक्रेन युद्ध की वजह से 2022 में यूरोप में ऊर्जा संकट पैदा हुई... यूरोपीय देशों के रूसी एनर्जी पर निर्भरता ने यूरोपीय देशों को बड़ा झटका दिया।
subnarratives.reasoning: This describes a negative consequence for Europe (an energy crisis and a 'big shock') resulting from the war and its own dependence on Russian energy. It supports the parent narrative of negative consequences for the West but does not fit the specific definitions about sanctions backfiring or refugee flows.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Speculating war outcomes: Ukrainian army is collapsing
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन में लाखों लोगों को बेघर भी होना पड़ा और शहर-के-शहर तबाह कर दिए गए.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote describes widespread destruction of cities and displacement of millions in Ukraine, which directly supports the subnarrative of the Ukrainian military and state facing significant decline and collapse in the face of the Russian invasion.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूसी सेना दो साल में भी यूक्रेन को 'निपटा' पाने में विफल रही.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement speculates on the outcome of the war by highlighting Russia's failure to achieve its objectives, which is a speculative assessment of the war's progress but does not fit the specific definitions of either army collapsing or losing all territories.
